response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering fundamentals and 14+ years of experience across multiple domains, he lacks the core technical requirement for this role: deep C++ expertise and industrial systems background. His resume shows only ~6 months of C++ work at National Instruments, with primary experience in JavaScript/TypeScript and D Language. Additionally, he lacks demonstrated expertise in multi-threading, concurrent programming, industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), and IoT/embedded systems—all critical for this position. The current career gap further reduces immediate availability.
strengths: 14+ years of software engineering experience exceeding the 8–12 year requirement, with proven ability to architect and deliver complex systems
Strong track record of mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops, Code Kata sessions, and teaching; demonstrates leadership qualities
Full-stack capability and adaptability across multiple languages and platforms; cloud experience with AWS CDK and proven software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ development experience at National Instruments; primary expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript and D Language, not C++ and STL as required
No demonstrated expertise in multi-threading, networking, concurrent programming, or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA); lacks industrial/embedded systems background
No evidence of security standards knowledge (IEC 62443, SDL, secure development lifecycle); currently in career gap since October 2025 due to caregiving

key_factors.factor: Industrial/embedded systems and security standards background
